subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the gate of reunion hath been opened unto all who dwell in earth and heaven, and that which lay hidden hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه فتح باب اللقاء علی من فی الارض و السماء و ظهر ما کان مکنونا فی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
